title: Use of English - Test 2
explanation:
Use of English - B2 Test 2

Second mixed review at B2 level.

questions.text: Not only [*did|does|do] the team win, but they also broke the record.
He [*needn't have printed|mustn't print|should print] the whole document; it was online.
She denied [*leaking|to leak|leak] the confidential email.
All I wanted [*was|were|is] a straight answer.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The jury reached a unanimous ____.  | *verdict | verdicts | sentence
The company plans to ____ into Asian markets. | *expand | expansion | expanded
There is growing public ____ about climate policy. | *debate | debating | debated
The patient made a full ____ after surgery. | *recovery | recover | recovered
Hardly [*had|have|did] we sat down when the fire alarm rang.
They accused him [*of fraud|for fraud|to fraud].
The development of renewable energy is a key [*priority|prior|prioritise].
Nor [*did|do|was] the minister answer the question directly.
